# Sample Library

This is preamble text that comes before any H2 heading.
It should become its own Doc titled "Sample Library".

## Installation

Install the library with:

```bash
go get example.com/sample
```

## Usage

Use the library like this:

```go
// ## NotAHeading — this is inside a code fence and must NOT split.
client := sample.New()
```

Call `client.Do()` to perform operations.

## Advanced

Advanced configuration options are available via the config struct.
